details: Latest PyPI release visible from the registry page is 0.5.6.
Package topic is speech/noise reduction and the distribution is installable as a Python package.
Repository and sample pages describe DeepFilterNet as a speech enhancement / denoising system.
Issue reports and examples reference the deepFilter CLI for local enhancement runs.
A task-specific 48kHz noisy speech fixture was generated locally from a tracked LibriSpeech sample with deterministic pink-noise mixing for phase-1 validation.

open_questions: Exact runtime weight storage path will be confirmed during FETCH_WEIGHTS.
CLI output filename convention will be confirmed during VALIDATE_INFER.
